rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total_hits>=1 -> FAIL

results.title: Scalable Fingerprinting of LLMs (Nasery 2025/02)
results.note: Multiple fingerprint payloads conceptually relate to multi-attribute but no disjoint coordinate sets / per-attribute probe; below all thresholds.

results.title: Are Robust LLM Fingerprints Adversarially Robust? (2025/09)
results.note: Touches tamper-evidence and fingerprints but no multi-attribute orthogonal encoding; below thresholds.

results.title: Robust LLM Fingerprinting overview
results.note: Generic overview of uniqueness/harmlessness/reliability; no multi-attribute orthogonal payload mechanism.

results.title: ADD for Multi-Bit Image Watermarking (2026/04)
results.note: Multi-bit watermark embedding owner+user+timestamp+IP via orthogonal watermark components is functionally near-identical to MOKO multi-attribute orthogonal-coordinate encoding; image domain but mechanism collides.

results.title: Watermarking LMs for Many Adaptive Users (Cohen 2024)
results.note: Per-user payload tracking is single-payload-per-user, not orthogonal multi-attribute with partial readout; below thresholds.

results.title: Watermark-Conditioned Diffusion Model IP Protection (2024)
results.note: Mutually-orthogonal watermark components directly match orthogonal coordinate-set encoding; multi-payload IP protection mechanism overlaps strongly.

results.title: Transferable Multi-Bit Watermarking via Latent Consistency Bridges (2026/03)
results.note: Multi-bit watermarking with bit channels; no explicit attribute-specific probe or coordinate-set partitioning; below thresholds.

results.title: LLM Fingerprinting Semantically Conditioned Watermarks (2025/05)
results.note: Single statistical signal on semantic queries; candidate explicitly differentiates; below thresholds.

fail_reason: Two prior works collide with MOKO-FINGERPRINT's core mechanism of orthogonal multi-attribute watermark payloads: (1) Result 4 (ADD multi-bit image watermarking, 2604.11491) embeds owner+user+timestamp+IP via orthogonal components -- functionally near-identical multi-attribute orthogonal encoding (func=0.85, sem=0.78, kw>=2); (2) Result 6 (Watermark-Conditioned Diffusion 2403.10893v1) uses mutually-orthogonal watermark components for IP protection (sem=0.7, func=0.72). The candidate's claim of novel ORTHOGONAL MULTI-ATTRIBUTE encoding is anticipated; only the explicit attribute-specific probe + Maori framing differ, not the core fingerprinting mechanism.
